a.style: font-family:'Playfair Display', Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Liberation Serif', serif

text.tspan: Share of one-person households vs. GDP per capita, 2018
GDP per capita is adjusted to account for inflation and differences in prices between countries. Colors
represent world regions. Bubble sizes are proportional to the population of the country.
Data source: OWID based on UN and other sources; World Bank (2023)
